automation_target: Codex weekly via SEC EDGAR 13F (dataroma + stockcircle + hedgefollow scrape) + CapitolTrades for Pelosi + ark-funds.com for ARKK
status: VERIFIED — Q1 2026 (period ending 2026-03-31) 13F filings pulled for 22 of 25 SEC-tracked filers via dataroma.com, stockcircle.com, hedgefollow.com, insidermonkey.com, and SEC EDGAR. Burry (Scion) on Q3 2025 — Scion is exempt from filing during certain quarters and Q1 2026 not yet released. Founders Fund (Thiel) files a near-empty 13F because portfolio is private (SpaceX, Anduril, Anthropic, Stripe). Pelosi pulled from House PTR filings via capitoltrades.com.

traders.name: Warren Buffett
traders.notable_recent_change: Major Chevron trim (-35%) and started a sizable Alphabet position (+204% add) plus new Delta Air Lines stake. Significant rotation out of energy into mega-cap tech.
traders.thesis_summary: Quality compounders bought at fair prices, financed by insurance float. Won't time markets — waits for fat pitches and lets the cash pile grow when valuations stretch.

traders.name: Bill Ackman
traders.tagline: Concentrated activist · big swings, public fights
traders.notable_recent_change: Initiated a fresh Microsoft position at 15% weight and added another 19% to Amazon — Pershing pivoting hard toward AI-leveraged mega-caps. Portfolio still only 11 names.
traders.thesis_summary: Concentrated bets on simple, predictable, dominant businesses with long runways. Will go activist if management lags or capital allocation drifts.

traders.name: Seth Klarman
traders.tagline: Margin of safety · cash is a position
traders.notable_recent_change: Big Amazon add (+47%) suggests Klarman now sees enough margin of safety in mega-cap tech to lean in. Otherwise standard Baupost: rails, distribution, healthcare.
traders.thesis_summary: Buy when others are forced to sell. Cash is a position, not a failure to invest. Public 13F is a fraction of the true book — much of Baupost sits in private credit and distressed paper.

traders.name: Mohnish Pabrai
traders.notable_recent_change: Trimmed Transocean by ~25% but doubled down on the coal pair (Warrior Met + Alpha Met). Three-stock book — extreme conviction on energy and met coal.
traders.thesis_summary: 'Heads I win, tails I don't lose much.' Look for cloned ideas with asymmetric payoffs, concentrate brutally, hold for years.

traders.name: Joel Greenblatt
traders.tagline: Magic formula · quant value at scale
traders.notable_recent_change: Highly diversified — 1,749 positions. Tail of small individual bets behind core ETF anchor positions.
traders.thesis_summary: Combine cheap with good. Rank the market on earnings yield and ROIC, hold a basket of the top deciles, let the math work out. Spreads risk across hundreds of names.

traders.name: Howard Marks
traders.notable_recent_change: Broad trimming across the top positions — Marks pruning into strength. Public 13F is a sliver of Oaktree's real book (mostly private credit / distressed funds).
traders.thesis_summary: You can't predict, you can prepare. Wait for cycles to hand you forced sellers in distressed credit, then load up. The equity 13F is only the visible tip.

traders.name: David Einhorn
traders.notable_recent_change: Green Brick Partners now nearly 20% of the book — Einhorn's biggest conviction homebuilder bet. Trimming the rest of the portfolio.
traders.thesis_summary: Forensic accounting + accounting-fraud short hunting, balanced with deep-value longs in unloved cyclicals. Will publicly trash a thesis when the case is strong.

traders.name: Michael Burry
traders.notable_recent_change: Three-stock book: managed care (MOH), beaten-down consumer discretionary (LULU), and student loan servicer (SLM). Scion's classic 'broken but not dead' setup.
traders.thesis_summary: Concentrated contrarian bets on names the market has left for dead. Often runs short books or puts in parallel. Burry frequently goes dark for several quarters then re-emerges.

traders.name: Ray Dalio
traders.notable_recent_change: Trimmed broad S&P ETFs hard (-36% IVV) and rotated into single-stock AI exposure — Amazon doubled, Micron added 66%. Bridgewater pivoting from passive to active tech.
traders.thesis_summary: Diversify across uncorrelated returns streams. Use risk parity and macro overlays. Public 13F is a noisy slice of the real Pure Alpha + All-Weather machine.

traders.name: Stanley Druckenmiller
traders.tagline: Macro legend · best trader of his generation
traders.notable_recent_change: Natera now a 20% bet — Druck's biggest position. Massive add to ST Micro (+238%) and YPF (+433%) signals concentrated semis + Argentine recovery thesis.
traders.thesis_summary: Identify the macro regime, position big when conviction aligns, cut fast when wrong. Liquidity drives markets — track central bank balance sheets first.

traders.name: David Tepper
traders.notable_recent_change: Doubled Amazon and more than tripled Uber. Tepper aggressively positioning for AI-leveraged platforms + China consumer reflation (TSM, BABA stack).
traders.thesis_summary: Reads the Fed reaction function better than anyone. Lever up when the cycle says load up; raise cash when it says hide. Distressed roots, macro overlay.

traders.name: Daniel Loeb
traders.notable_recent_change: Trimming nearly every top position into strength — Carpenter Technology cut 60%, CRH cut 27%. Loeb taking chips off the table after the run.
traders.thesis_summary: Event-driven value. Find a catalyst, sometimes write the catalyst via public activist letter. Mixes deep-value with willingness to short and short-circuit management.

traders.name: George Soros / Robert Soros
traders.notable_recent_change: Massive new Sunbelt Rentals position (~36% of book post-Ashtead reorg) plus Nvidia stake up 61%. Robert Soros leaning into AI + UK equipment rental rollup.
traders.thesis_summary: Reflexivity — markets shape the fundamentals they're supposed to reflect. Position big against perceived consensus errors. Long book now skews tech + special situations.

traders.name: Chase Coleman
traders.tagline: Tiger cub · growth tech, public + private
traders.notable_recent_change: Massive TSMC add (+49%) and Meta add (+12%). Tiger Global back to its AI-thesis playbook after the 2022-23 drawdown.
traders.thesis_summary: Concentrated long-term bets on tech monopolies and platform compounders. Public 13F is a slice — Tiger's real edge is the private growth book.

traders.name: Philippe Laffont
traders.notable_recent_change: Coatue rotated hard into semi-cap equipment (TSM/LRCX/AMAT/AVGO stack = ~30% of book). New $655M ASML stake initiated. Exited Oracle, Snowflake, Adobe, Arm, AMD entirely.
traders.thesis_summary: TMT specialist running both public and private growth books. Plays the AI infrastructure trade through semi-cap + hyperscaler picks-and-shovels.

traders.name: Stephen Mandel
traders.tagline: Tiger cub · global growth at scale
traders.notable_recent_change: Vistra now top weight on AI power demand thesis. Applovin add (+88%) signals deep conviction on ad-tech AI cycle. Carpenter Technology added 38%.
traders.thesis_summary: Long-only quality growth, global mandate. Concentrated on dominant franchises with high returns on incremental capital and durable competitive moats.

traders.name: Daniel Sundheim
traders.notable_recent_change: Massive Danaher add (+312%) and MercadoLibre boost (+67%). Sundheim rotating into quality cash compounders + LatAm e-commerce.
traders.thesis_summary: Hybrid public-private model. Buys quality franchises across public markets and pre-IPO growth — sizing is conviction-led and patient.

traders.name: Lee Ainslie
traders.notable_recent_change: Big Nu Holdings add (+92%) on LatAm fintech thesis. Trimming TSM (-25%) while still leaning Nvidia + AI infrastructure.
traders.thesis_summary: Sector-focused long-short equity. Run by ex-Tiger PMs with deep industry research. Concentrated longs balanced by active short book (not visible on 13F).

traders.name: Carl Icahn
traders.notable_recent_change: Book remains 75%+ in Icahn-controlled vehicles (IEP + CVI + UAN). Pure holding-company structure — public 13F barely moves quarter to quarter.
traders.thesis_summary: Find under-managed companies, take a board seat, force the catalyst. The 13F is structurally a holding-co snapshot — the real activity is in proxy filings.

traders.name: Nelson Peltz
traders.notable_recent_change: Ultra-concentrated 8-stock book. Janus Henderson + GE Aerospace = 72% of the portfolio. Trian holds for years — quarterly noise is minimal.
traders.thesis_summary: Operational activism. Take a meaningful stake, work with management privately, fix margins and capital allocation. Hold for 3-7 years.

traders.name: Cathie Wood
traders.notable_recent_change: Tesla still top weight but trimmed -2.9%. Big Roku cut (-35%). Circle (CRCL) and Robinhood rising as fintech-on-rails thesis takes weight from legacy biotech.
traders.thesis_summary: Five-year horizon on disruptive innovation — AI, blockchain, robotics, genomics, energy storage. Concentrated, high-beta, ETF-issuer not a hedge fund (no 13F, but daily portfolio disclosure on ark-funds.com).

traders.name: Leopold Aschenbrenner
traders.tagline: AGI thesis fund · Decade Ahead bet
traders.status: SUMMARY-ENTRY — covered separately in Dainer's existing Leopold tracking. Fund concentrates on AI-infrastructure equities and select compute hyperscalers per the Situational Awareness essay's compute-demand thesis. Holdings list intentionally omitted here; see leopold-aschenbrenner-perspective skill.
traders.notable_recent_change: First full year as a 13F filer. Reports show concentration in semiconductor + power/cooling stack consistent with public AGI thesis.
traders.thesis_summary: Decade Ahead thesis — compute scales 100,000x, electricity becomes the binding constraint, US-vs-China race dominates 2027-2030. Long the picks-and-shovels of that race.

traders.name: Peter Thiel
traders.tagline: Contrarian VC · SpaceX, Anduril, Anthropic backer
traders.status: PARTIAL — Founders Fund Management (IV/II/III/VII vintage entities) files 13F but discloses only public-equity holdings. Most recent Founders Fund IV Q4 2025 filing reports effectively zero qualifying 13F positions because Founders' real book is private equity in SpaceX (largest single position, ~$18B mark), Anduril ($30.5B valuation round Jun 2025), Anthropic, Stripe, Palantir (now public — held mostly outside the IV vehicle).
traders.notable_recent_change: Closed $4.6B Growth IV in April 2025. Led Anduril's 2025 $1B Series G — largest single investment in Founders Fund history. Building $6B for next round of bets per Q1 2026 reporting.
traders.thesis_summary: Contrarian / monopoly thesis (Zero to One). Hunt for companies building genuine monopolies in defense, space, AI, finance. Public 13F materially understates the real portfolio.

traders.name: Bill Gates
traders.fund: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust (Cascade Investment dir.)
traders.notable_recent_change: MAJOR: Sold the last of Microsoft in Q1 2026 (~7.7M shares / $3.7B exit). A year ago MSFT was 26% of the trust; now zero. Pure industrials + Berkshire stack now.
traders.thesis_summary: Steward foundation capital across multi-decade durable franchises. Buffett, waste, rails, ag/industrial equipment. Will sell completely if mission funding demands liquidity (as MSFT exit shows).

traders.name: Nancy Pelosi
traders.notable_recent_change: Rotated Alphabet (sold a chunk, then re-bought across two trades). New AllianceBernstein position ($1-5M). Continued accumulation in big tech.
traders.thesis_summary: Personal trades disclosed under the STOCK Act (45-day lag). Heavy big-tech tilt — Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Amazon recur across years. Often trades around legislative cycles.

traders.name: Eric Trump
traders.tagline: Not publicly disclosed · we do not track
traders.status: NOT-DISCLOSED — Eric Trump / Trump Organization holdings are NOT publicly disclosed via SEC. Trump Org is a private real estate / hospitality holding company. No 13F filing exists. The family's reported asset mix (real estate, hotels, golf properties, plus crypto-aligned ventures via World Liberty Financial and TMTG / Trump Media stake) is reported by the press but not via institutional filings. We do not track this and you should not treat anything reported as comparable to the other 25 filers above.
traders.notable_recent_change: Public commentary in 2024-2025 centered on Trump Organization's crypto pivot (World Liberty Financial token launch, TMTG / DJT stake) and continued real estate development. No filing-grade data.
traders.thesis_summary: Family office / private real-estate + politically-adjacent crypto ventures. Not a 13F filer — included here only because the user named him; the honest answer is that there is no public dataset to track.
